name: platxa-project-structure
description: Auto-generates Claude Code project structure (.claude/rules, skills, agents, CLAUDE.md, hook suggestions) for any codebase. Detects tech stack, monorepo patterns, infrastructure-as-code, CI configs, and sharp edges. Emits path-scoped rules, progressively disclosed skills with canonical frontmatter (name, allowed-tools, paths, disable-model-invocation), domain-matched and complexity-triggered subagents, and hook recommendations using canonical Claude Code event names (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, InstructionsLoaded). Supports --dry-run, --audit, --update, --with-local, and --seed-memory modes.
